title: Senior Financial Analyst - Deloitte India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Deloitte India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Deloitte India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Deloitte India:
Deloitte India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India!
